Exile Summoned  

Description

1: Decrease Hitpoints by 798.

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 185 Skill: Evocation
Casting Time: 4.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Resist Adjust: -50 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 5 Deletable: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Summoned Spell Type: Detrimental
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso staggers.

Game Description

A burst of holy light that causes between 798 and @1 damage to a summoned target.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Exile Summoned

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Exile Summoned
ClassLevel
MAG56
RNG61
DRU55
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (14)
  • Sold By (12)

Spell found
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2011 at 12:13 AM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
15 posts
Found this spell on Eyon Swougius in East Freeport on FV, along with level 57 pet spell. Zone in through North Ro. Go left along the wall. You will see the town Crier. She is with a couple of other merchants. Quite a few spells on her and the others.

# Feb 05 2005 at 5:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966530020
18 posts
I have located Arial Fern, due to a GM event F.V. docks has been envaded. Do not know if this will be for good or just for now. He is located at the Eastern Outpost on the east wall of Firiona Vie. Need to go down a long corridor into an island like place, he is in south end in field.

# Feb 05 2005 at 4:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966530020
18 posts
Has F.V. been changed for good or is this a GM?
Went there today trying to get this spell was killed! Went back after rez and all merchants are gone and the bank also. Where is Arial now?
Is there somewhere else to get these spells that he sold? Also Druid epic NPC gone too!
▲ Page top
where can i get this spell
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2005 at 3:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591803037273
7 posts
tryed to goto fv today was filled with giants and dark elfs cond dark blue to me at 63 is there any other way to get this spell?

Edited, Fri Feb 4 16:49:39 2005
▲ Page top
Yeah!
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2004 at 1:02 AM Rating: Decent
dafdaf
View User Forum
Scholar
1,273 posts
Well as a 63 ranger I love this spell!

So long as you don't expect to use this spell often then you'll think of it as I do - a great little toy.

Having just moved to fighting in BoT, around a fifth of the pulls will be elementals, and there are many others throughout the game. This spell fits in perfectly between arching meaning that I'm doing an EXTRA 725 damage from each cast.

The main problem is it drains a fair chunk of mana, but often groups have so much mana regen that it doesn't matter in practice.
▲ Page top
BLEH!!!
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2004 at 8:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773494268
1 post
That spell sucks donkey ****.
▲ Page top
worthless spell
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2004 at 2:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791928377
22 posts
What is the point of this spell? The level 52 Char is higher dps and not limited to target type. Aside from the -50 to resist this spell it is less effecient than either char or scars.

IMO it should do around 900 damage or cost around 175 mana.

On another note why the hell do druids get this a level before mages?

Edited, Wed Feb 4 18:54:12 2004
▲ Page top
Is this good for a Mage to use?
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2004 at 3:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759725400
21 posts
I didnt do all the math, but just by glancing shouldnt this be better casting time or something to bring Mages more up to speed with dealing with elementals?

The reason I say is because frankly those other classes that focus their lethality on one particlar type of monsters, like pallys with undead and druids with animals, due so in a very dominant fashion. Im sure that in the later game Mages can dominate elementals and the like very well, but my 55 mage Qilin doesnt dominate them any more so than any other character I feel. Plus how many places are there 55+ where I would take this spell in a spell slot over my other DD spells up to now? Does the magic resist on this spell really make it worh it?
▲ Page top
